stemHtml: When the autothrust part of the flight guidance system is in SPEED mode, the thrust is…

options.a: Constant in order to maintain the best rate of climb or descent.
options.b: Constant in order to maintain the target engine speed for a given thrust setting.
options.c: Varied as required to maintain the selected airspeed or Mach Number.
options.d: Varied in order to maintain a selected vertical speed.
